heroDescription: We help brands, enterprises, and game studios build custom games and interactive apps — from branded minigames to full mobile titles — delivered by a studio trusted by AirAsia and Khazanah Nasional.
aboutP1: Hidden Chest is a Malaysian game development studio delivering award-calibre interactive experiences across PC, console, and mobile, and bespoke brand installations. Founded in 2020, we operate at the intersection of game design, technology, and storytelling.
aboutP2: We've shipped interactive projects for AirAsia and Khazanah Nasional, and our own flagship IP — Midwest 90: Rapid City — is in early access on Steam and Itch.io. Every project is managed directly by a co-founder. No middlemen, no overhead.
flagshipDescription: Tycoon survival simulator. Build a city in the American Midwest during the 1990s — manage resources, survive harsh winters, and grow your settlement into a thriving community. Free alpha available on Steam.
contactDescription: Have a game idea, branded gamification, AR/VR installation, or mobile app — drop us a line and let's talk scope, timeline, and budget.
